title: Cheesy Spicy Fajitas
description: A spicy twist on traditional fajitas, featuring a velvety cheese sauce and a blend of mexican spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the spicy sauce, mexican seasoning, and fajita seasoning. Stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the fajitas by placing the beef and vegetable mixture onto a tortilla and topping with cheese and velvety cheese sauce.
Optional: top with additional shredded cheese, sour cream, and diced tomatoes.
